CVE-1999-0537.title: A configuration in a web browser such as Internet Explorer or Net ...
CVE-1999-0537.summary: A configuration in a web browser such as Internet Explorer or Netscape Navigator allows execution of active content such as ActiveX, Java, Javascript, etc.

CVE-1999-1226.title: Netscape Communicator 4.7 and earlier allows remote attackers to  ...
CVE-1999-1226.summary: Netscape Communicator 4.7 and earlier allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service, and possibly execute arbitrary commands, via a long certificate key.

CVE-1999-1357.title: Netscape Communicator 4.04 through 4.7 (and possibly other versio ...
CVE-1999-1357.summary: Netscape Communicator 4.04 through 4.7 (and possibly other versions) in various UNIX operating systems converts the 0x8b character to a "<" sign, and the 0x9b character to a ">" sign, which could allow remote attackers to attack other clients via cross-site scripting (CSS) in CGI programs that do not filter these characters.
